epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Dix-Hallpike test; red flags prompt evaluation for central vertigo

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high when maneuvers are used; many rely on symptomatic meds

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often treated symptomatically; maneuver use varies
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Epley maneuver and vestibular exercises; minimize vestibular suppressants; refer if atypical
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Underuse of repositioning maneuvers and limited vestibular rehab access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Low-cost effective maneuvers can be delivered in primary care with training
